codeReview.summary: The fix restores repeated startup idempotency for the persistent SQLite database by backfilling the real `0012_targeted_runtime_indexes` migration marker when both intended indexes already exist. The implementation uses the shipped migration timestamp from `drizzle/meta/_journal.json`, preserves the intended index set, and adds regression coverage for the persistent-database case.

summary: Reviewed commit ed57005e725f5b88eb62a482bc925c04c05ad85e, the handoff, transcript skeleton, and shared-state docs. The feature passes: persistent `data/opengecko.db` startups no longer replay the targeted index migration and fail with duplicate-index errors.
